body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to be YOUR champion in Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

The reason the extreme Left is attacking everyone and rioting is because they know they can't win elections. Look at the sort of policies they like!

-Tearing down historical statues

-Abolishing the police

-Abolishing the Constitution

-Attacking with violence anyone who disagrees with them

-Abolishing churches and Christianity

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

These people don't want to do away with just Confederate statues. THEY WANT TO DO AWAY WITH AMERICA!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

Part of their plan to do away with America is to get rid of the rule of law. Our country was founded on "Equal Justice Under Law".

But what the radical Left- this "new" Democrat party- wants is NOT freedom, NOR liberty.

What they want is chaos, destruction, and murder. But I don't!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

They with to take away your freedom and replace it with a Communist dictatorship.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

I am not a career politician or a slick fundraiser. I'm a career soldier who wants to defend our country against all enemies- foreign and domestic.

That's why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Will you join this fight with me? I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw
I have a big fundraising deadline TODAY- and I'm still about $9,000

short of my goal. I need you to help me reach my goal!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The radical Democrats are going to lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fw5LUsqCK_6OuRU&b=HFyZeyV89yFVBbkZiBqsDw
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight against Nancy Pelosi and for America, every chance I get.
I was behind President Trump from the start because I knew we needed a fighter! And seeing the Democrats go off the deep edge into radical Socialism, we need fighters now more than ever.
[Can you join me in this fight](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEBHbWpDDpNxmng&b=XArJ8rMUwzgiyftbbP6yZw)? I need to raise the money to take out Nancy Pelosi's deputy.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEBHbWpDDpNxmng&b=XArJ8rMUwzgiyftbbP6yZw)
---

**_I cannot stand the thought of looking at Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker's chair for another Congress. Help me do better!_**

[With so little time left before the deadline, I'm relying on you. Can you be the one who puts me over the top?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEBHbWpDDpNxmng&b=XArJ8rMUwzgiyftbbP6yZw)

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her "kneeling radicals"! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEBHbWpDDpNxmng&b=XArJ8rMUwzgiyftbbP6yZw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEBHbWpDDpNxmng&b=XArJ8rMUwzgiyftbbP6yZw). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,

Senator Cornyn's team is RUNNING SCARED. For months now, they've been calling in big-money donors from Big Pharma to the Koch network to spend millions and asking insiders from Karl Rove to Mitch McConnell to carry their message.

_Sen. Ted Cruz: 45%_
_Gov. Greg Abbott: 56%_
**Sen. John Cornyn: 37%**
**Now polls are showing how beatable Senator Cornyn is in Texas. We don't have any time to lose, y'all. The moment MJ wins the runoff, we need to IMMEDIATELY take the fight to Sen. Cornyn.

[So we launched a $100,000 Fight Back Fund goal! Pitch in right now to make sure this campaign is prepared to take on and DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn, Mitch McConnell's right-hand man.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890176/7f51f7bc/41018a45/4ef61a59/4134103390/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200703.2nd__1647__&amount=10")**

We need you right now, Peter.

\-- Team MJ
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890176/7f51f7bc/41018a45/4ef61a59/4134103390/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200703.2nd__1647__&amount=10")**

body:
This is leadership that we can’t afford to lose this November – and I’ll do everything I can to make sure that NY-22 sees a full recovery! Friend, Before we celebrate America’s 244th birthday tomorrow, I want to get you up to speed on everything that’s been going on around our district, our state, and our country. From the latest jobs numbers to reconciling our nation’s past, here’s all the headlines impacting the race for NY-22. **⬇️ MUST-SEE HEADLINE FROM THIS WEEK ⬇️**
**Read My OP-ED:** **How We Can Build A Better America without Tearing It Down First** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=ff477f166d1642f1b6f05e37ac1dc8f2&_e=ngQXsNoynKK5zpRbIkmvieOU8fEFJ3Z-mM69UFycQi60tneOaNMLNtIww_VsHMXcOZrLeU2Gv3l4qGL8l5dmPqLcsnb0oMibkvB5jHoGGQggh8wD9Oflo1G0lwGqaAUcXsWIfi3P0TA-8P4PaNmRt8zMjT5Gc3wK6eHZ5XnUi8gk_MhXWKUxliMljNMJQk0dpITQTezW7SjLDIEobZRJ_MopCHbWm2Wn3RbxYRScVNgX4elLxNIPU7RpT_UgYjLC-T8TgFZEfcgHlwnl0jyTJi7pppMqb9sca2IUAaLv0Q_2mcQkeX26bCoS0zNQQpYwIF9O-iEYK1WViKSps3NAs-3ftxfA6XrKP6yNagqj9msjHRPzN8B9lbWqiQ1GdV-QNI-O7NWmCVS-4XPzUurOrkz4IGtRHiv5IyLSG9Gg5wxFhxXOhQsBP9elV0JV3CqZvuIOcgS8jmI3DxL3X-xAKWNs2RlzEhstjkkMUFNiI5m6m6csjEz0yVfBBrlh_AcGO9wA1KZ2NYq3SsMShdrpmvEq5-oiX-O_0VHWSe9hqlCeMHX55DRuFZyLsGFtFZR9vLlpUhyfS7bikcESAEU2-qQ7zu-TAF3GvGA7gt_YEAMX9RZ9a-W8wTpn-Bp4-JnhLhKt75MC2PQc_hUoFcghUQ%3D%3D) I’ve always believed that America is the greatest nation in the world but not a perfect one. Americans must realize that tearing down statues and vandalizing monuments will never change our past. Instead, now is the time to chart a course for the future that results in a better America for all its citizens.
Read my entire op-ed **[here](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=ff477f166d1642f1b6f05e37ac1dc8f2&_e=ngQXsNoynKK5zpRbIkmvieOU8fEFJ3Z-mM69UFycQi60tneOaNMLNtIww_VsHMXcOZrLeU2Gv3l4qGL8l5dmPqLcsnb0oMibkvB5jHoGGQggh8wD9Oflo1G0lwGqaAUcXsWIfi3P0TA-8P4PaNmRt8zMjT5Gc3wK6eHZ5XnUi8gk_MhXWKUxliMljNMJQk0dpITQTezW7SjLDIEobZRJ_MopCHbWm2Wn3RbxYRScVNgX4elLxNIPU7RpT_UgYjLC-T8TgFZEfcgHlwnl0jyTJi7pppMqb9sca2IUAaLv0Q_2mcQkeX26bCoS0zNQQpYwIF9O-iEYK1WViKSps3NAs-3ftxfA6XrKP6yNagqj9msjHRPzN8B9lbWqiQ1GdV-QNI-O7NWmCVS-4XPzUurOrkz4IGtRHiv5IyLSG9Gg5wxFhxXOhQsBP9elV0JV3CqZ6v6MhImG0MWAcmdsif-u29aRUy0slmxKuXzwhvbjUtM8VX_9Awk63FL5rozQQ2-cXy1leuCfukP_C75mEvomwkU-fKGPbinGdu5Y-yvr2oHjQmlev7039k0TwOFPrH5yXdxML-t57mS0lmoFN_gs-XFEh8-G4qHI5Dci7dl22gRN9R2gcgsEtVINKoy6dJ7kT22fhYKxjmzVtFR1mnI9LA%3D%3D)**. | |

clean_body: This is leadership that we can’t afford to lose this November – and I’ll do everything I can to make sure that NY-22 sees a full recovery! Friend, Before we celebrate America’s 244th birthday tomorrow, I want to get you up to speed on everything that’s been going on around our district, our state, and our country. From the latest jobs numbers to reconciling our nation’s past, here’s all the headlines impacting the race for NY-22. ⬇️ MUST-SEE HEADLINE FROM THIS WEEK ⬇️ Read My OP-ED: How We Can Build A Better America without Tearing It Down First I’ve always believed that America is the greatest nation in the world but not a perfect one. Americans must realize that tearing down statues and vandalizing monuments will never change our past. Instead, now is the time to chart a course for the future that results in a better America for all its citizens. Read my entire op-ed . | | Congratulations to Utica’s Newest Police Officers! There’s never been a tougher time to put on a police officer’s uniform for the first time than right now. I applaud Utica’s 14 recently sworn-in officers for taking that step to defend their community at a time when Democratic mayors, governors, and representatives in Congress have abandoned them at every turn. I will always be right there to support NY-22’s brave police! Congratulate Utica’s new officers . | Brindisi Sides with Pelosi Against Americans – Again! Anthony Brindisi promised to hold China accountable for their actions in the wake of the COVID-19 outbreak. Instead, he sold out his vote to Nancy Pelosi (again) by refusing to simply condemn their recent aggressions against American vaccine research facilities. What will it be, Brindisi – NY-22 or Pelosi? View and share the post . | Local Organizations Need Support Now More Than Ever. Here’s how You can Help: Churches, non-profits, American Legions, and other cornerstones of our communities haven’t been able to hold regular fundraisers lately – but they still continue to provide for those in their neighborhoods. If you see one of these organizations holding an event in the near future, I encourage you to show them some support however you can! Every bit goes a long way! View and share the video . | The Great American Comeback is in Full Swing – See For Yourself! Our economy added a record 4.8 million jobs and unemployment fell to 11.1% in June! President Trump’s leadership on the economy is opening businesses back up and getting workers back on their feet in all 50 states. This is leadership that we can’t afford to lose this November – and I’ll do everything I can to make sure that NY-22 sees a full recovery! View and share the post . | Help Me Say Happy Birthday to One of NY-22’s Most Special Residents! Mary Milanowski – a longtime supporter of President Trump – celebrated her 107th birthday this week! Mary is special to so many people in our community, and she even got to meet President Trump during his visit to our area in 2018. Happy birthday, Mary! name: Bettina Weiss
subject: an update on Abigail's work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/qiswptMlXsCOqq6O-vlv5alBTXC0HF_DcjIEUa1E-M8=?refcode=BW7.3)
---
| Dear Peter, I am writing to provide a quick update on what Abigail has been working on these last few days on Capitol Hill. Here's the recap: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/iDNqihqUWzYEwct8iaHP_ntWv5Z4FiUizTEp3e8LRo8=?cid=sm_npd_ms_tw_ma) [**_Allegations of Russian Bounties_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/iDNqihqUWzYEwct8iaHP_ntWv5Z4FiUizTEp3e8LRo8=?cid=sm_npd_ms_tw_ma) There have been stunning reports in the news about a reported Russian effort to put bounties on the heads of American service-members and personnel in Afghanistan. **On Tuesday, Abigail went to the White House with a small group of colleagues to discuss the potential threats and U.S. response.** There is still more to be learned about these allegations, but a particularly troubling aspect is that we still have not seen a full-throated denunciation coming out of this White House against Russian aggression. Abigail wants to see this president and this White House administration say that they'll get to the bottom of these disturbing reports. We must find out more about these reports, and we must do so quickly. **It is potentially life and death for our servicemen and women deployed overseas in harm 's way.** _**[Watch Abigail 's interview with Katy Tur on Meet the Press Daily.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/d51catl6KKfq_ur5MAPR3hfNRrSY6IicWUpXu8V-lKs=)**_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/8KJxSnBLf3FquCv0hn947zpVX_xTCh0PIeeGh17U7Ys=) [_**Broadband Funding**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/8KJxSnBLf3FquCv0hn947zpVX_xTCh0PIeeGh17U7Ys=) This week, the House passed landmark broadband funding legislation as part of the **Moving America Forward Act,** as well as Abigail's amendment to improve high-speed internet speeds in our rural communities. It's exciting to see this legislation advance, because **closing the digital divide and keeping Central Virginia students and businesses competitive is one of Abigail 's top priorities in Congress. ** Abigail knows that our national infrastructure conversation must include a strong discussion about how we actually expand high-speed internet across rural and underserved communities. **High-speed internet access is fundamentally an issue of economic and educational opportunity.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/nqIcfAkJuEXJmk2mcNYHf-0y4dolGoMIzlxrAMSFenM=?fbclid=IwAR0Jpujp0Aeol27G02qMyWVdTvodEpcRHGNs5uLDT2OawKLsOCx0p0crsqQ) [_**Carbon Trading for Farmers**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/nqIcfAkJuEXJmk2mcNYHf-0y4dolGoMIzlxrAMSFenM=?fbclid=IwAR0Jpujp0Aeol27G02qMyWVdTvodEpcRHGNs5uLDT2OawKLsOCx0p0crsqQ) For generations, Central Virginia farmers and foresters have participated in USDA's voluntary conservation programs, and they understand what it means to be responsible stewards of the land. Last week, Abigail joined Congressman Don Bacon (R-NE) in introducing the **Growing Climate Solutions Act.** This bipartisan legislation would help farmers and producers gain greater access to the carbon marketplace. **This bill would provide market-based incentives to farmers who embrace climate-friendly practices -- a commonsense step in the fight against the climate crisis.** This bill would reduce barriers to market entry and promote sustainable farming practices by providing new support at the USDA and bringing technical assistance to those wishing to enroll in the carbon marketplace or begin other efforts related to on-site energy generation, carbon sequestration, or grassland management. Thank you for supporting this campaign. **Please connect with us on our campaign _[Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/WS3gfKlgQ5ap4EaMgETA6EmvHzdyJXMf56KqPzGiE_g=)_ and _[Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/C5u7ktGfEQvSBQkPOnFmKktxSUk51U3_zMQvnGxWvCo=)_ pages** -- that's where you'll find the most up-to-date information. I hope you all will have a safe and relaxing Independence Day weekend.
---
Thank you,

_Bettina _

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/qiswptMlXsCOqq6O-vlv5alBTXC0HF_DcjIEUa1E-M8=?refcode=BW7.3)

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/9oDe3zvattq9TYPaEty7XXt9Udo2-Lhb1sOce0MMZfo=/HI5NBh85uBHeQ8nlRwZ2Tmk7AQGRUiVDMhjSu9HDxG4=).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Hirsh Singh Files DOJ Complaint Against NJ Attorney General
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
Hirsh Singh vowed to defend the rights of Americans and said that he will stand up for the Constitution. "This is a fight for Constitutional values... | | | Dear Friend,

Tomorrow is the Fourth of July, a day we spend in remembrance of our brave forefathers and how they fought for our country. I will be remembering this as I fight to liberate New Jersey from the corruption that has taken hold.

The Never-Trump Republicans and Democrat are desperate to stop us but they are failing. They used the NJ Attorney General’s office against us for political purposes, and that is unacceptable. We have filed a formal complaint with the Department of Justice so they can investigate this wrongdoing and bring them to justice.

Press release below for the details, and please have a safe, relaxing Independence Day. I will never stop fighting for the people.

-Hirsh
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=dff8b9e1f5&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| July 3rd, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Hirsh Singh Files DOJ Complaint Against NJ Attorney General

**LINWOOD, NJ** — A conservative in the New Jersey Republican Primary for the U.S. Senate seat has filed an official complaint with the Department of Justice against New Jersey's Attorney General for attempting to violate his First and Fourth Amendment Rights by intimidating him and his election campaign.

Hirsh Singh, after consulting with county clerks on the state law, had sent out a mailer informing voters that they could request duplicate ballots if they had wrongly marked them. In response, the New Jersey Attorney General's office sent a cease-and-desist letter to Hirsh Singh's campaign claiming that Hirsh Singh's mailer was against the law and voters could not request another ballot.

However, the official Camden County website states that voters can request duplicate ballots if they marked them incorrectly. The ballots of several counties (including Atlantic County and Ocean County) also clearly state that voters can request duplicate ballots if they incorrectly marked them. Hirsh Singh's complaint to the Department of Justice points out that the Attorney General's office has attempted to intimidate him and violate the Free Speech and Free Association clauses of the First Amendment of the United States Constitution. The complaint further points out that the demand in the letter to produce the list of recipients of Hirsh Singh's email was in violation of the Fourth Amendment protection against unreasonable search and seizure.

The letter from the Attorney General's office appeared in the hands of the media and Singh's opponents around the same time Singh received it, suggesting that it was sent for political purposes and to prevent voters from requesting duplicate ballots. New Jersey's Attorney General Gurbir Singh Grewal is a Democrat and of Indian descent like Hirsh Singh.

"Our opponents in the Democrat Party behave like they are running a plantation and view people of several races — including those of Indian descent — as house slaves and field slaves and believe that they are using a house slave to control a field slave. This is shameful behavior," said Arvind Kumar, a key strategist on Hirsh Singh's campaign.

Hirsh Singh vowed to defend the rights of Americans and said that he will stand up for the Constitution. "This is a fight for Constitutional values. They aren't just coming after me. They are coming after the American Constitution and the American people. I will never allow this," he said.

Singh's complaint also named the New Jersey Secretary of State's office for improperly helping Singh's opponent Rikin Mehta, who had gotten onto the ballot by illegally using registered Democrats to circulate the petition necessary to get on the ballot. Petition circulators are required by law to belong to the same party as the candidate. Several signatures on Mehta's petition were also from Democrats, an unsurprising fact given that Mehta himself was a lifelong Democrat who voted for Obama, praised Obamacare and was awarded political appointments by two Democrat Mayors of Washington D.C.

According to Singh's complaint, the Secretary of State did not provide the signatures in a timely manner through the proper process, preventing Singh's campaign from performing a background check on all signatures to dispute their validity. The complaint also accuses the Secretary of State's office of producing additional signatures at the hearing, which Singh's campaign could not inspect earlier.

"There is collusion between the 'Never Trumper' Republicans, the Democrats and the establishment. They do not want an independent-minded conservative like me to win this primary because I can defeat Cory Booker in the general election and threaten their power structure. Remember that despite claiming to be Republicans, my opponents are the same people who helped Cory Booker win the election in 2013 and it is no surprise that they are working with Democrats against me," pointed out Hirsh Singh.
---
| ###
For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=f7a7d0906c&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=36b5001420&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: LIVE TONIGHT: President Trump speaks from Mount Rushmore!
body:
President Trump just left for South Dakota, where tonight he will attend Mount Rushmore’s Independence Day celebration! | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09cf69c9ef&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 3, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE at 10:10 p.m. ET: President Trump speaks from Mount Rushmore**

**President Trump just left** for South Dakota, where tonight he will become the first president since George H. W. Bush in 1991 to attend Mount Rushmore’s Independence Day celebration! The stunning fireworks show is returning after a decade-long hiatus.

[**WATCH LIVE: President Trump speaks from Mt. Rushmore at 10:10 p.m. ET**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d646b109d&e=3ee4985eea)

**The President** will then return to Washington to host tomorrow’s 2020 Salute to America celebration with First Lady Melania Trump. Tomorrow’s National Mall event will feature one of the largest fireworks displays in history, and President Trump will kick off the festivities with an address to the Nation from the White House South Lawn.

**The 2020 Salute to America** will be “a patriotic tribute to our men and women in uniform,” Interior Secretary David Bernhardt says.

[**Find out more about tomorrow’s 2020 Salute to America!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01ef9f3fe9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fef6903188&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c78dda4984&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=aab749bf6b)
